message:
fix(auth): persist auto-generated JWT secret across restarts in dev mode (#6850) (#6910)

When JWT_SECRET is not set in .env, the server now writes the generated
random secret to .jwt-secret (gitignored, 0600 permissions) and reads it
back on subsequent startups. This prevents "token signature is invalid"
errors after dev-mode restarts or hot-reloads.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
